mapper.sql: id, user_id, emp_no, name, email, phone, department, status, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (user_id, emp_no, name, email, phone, department, status, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{empNo}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{department}, IFNULL(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM employee WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM employee WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT e.id, e.user_id, e.emp_no, e.name, e.email, e.phone, e.department, e.status, e.remark, e.create_time, e.update_time FROM employee e INNER JOIN employee_type_rel r ON r.employee_id = e.id AND r.type_code = #{typeCode} WHERE e.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY e.name ASC, e.id ASC
